title: 1,000 AI agents, 0 LLM calls?
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to run 1,000 AI agents with minimal LLM calls by using deterministic logic for planning and the before_model_callback pattern to bypass model inference. The architecture scales stateless sessions via Redis while routing decisions like the Spine and Sprout algorithm run without LLM involvement.
